name: The Phantom Knights of Tomb Shield
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影騎士団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>トゥーム・シールド
desc: Special Summon this card in Attack Position as a Normal Monster (Warrior/DARK/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap.) During your turn, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up Trap your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn.
eff: Special Summon this card in Attack Position as a Normal Monster (Warrior/DARK/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap.) During your turn, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up Trap your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
